sourceMovie.title: In Your Dreams
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: In Your Dreams works as a animation movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The animation and family blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Wish Dragon
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If In Your Dreams clicked for you, Wish Dragon (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and family, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after In Your Dreams?
faq.answer: Try Wish Dragon, The Monkey King, Rugrats Go Wild—each shares DNA with In Your Dreams while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is In Your Dreams?
faq.answer: In Your Dreams (2025) is best described as Animation, Family, Comedy, Adventure, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is In Your Dreams worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
